simple_types.name: TTokenId
simple_types.code:
type TTokenId is (
   NullId,
   EotId,
   NewlineId,
   ErrorId,
   UnknownId,
   CommentId,
   UndefId,
   StringId,
   …,
   falseId);

subprograms.name: ReadToken
subprograms.code: procedure ReadToken (TokenId : out TTokenId; Token : out Ttokenstr)
